title: Improve your Rincoin Experience
description: Electrin brings the classic Electrum wallet feel to Rincoin.
Fast startup, familiar workflow, and simple self-custody.
Built for Rincoin users who want a lightweight desktop wallet.

title: Do not trust. Verify.
description: through SPV-style proofs and indexed servers.

title: Cold Storage
description: Sign transactions from a computer that
is always offline. Broadcast them from
a machine that does not have your keys.

title: Testing Release Candidate
description: Public RC build for wider testing.
Back up your wallet and use
small amounts only during this phase.

title: Free and Decentralized
description: Anyone can run a Fulcrum-rin server.
No single entity controls the network.

title: Multi-Platform
description: Electrin is available for Linux, Windows,
